metric: trigger accuracy (claude -p Skill tool mentions agentic-review-handoff; 1 run/query)

baseline_old_description.source: git HEAD description (v3.1.0 auto-loop text, 945 chars)

coverage: second pair of eyes + feedback validation
negatives: ordinary impl, non-git, weekly-report, /codex:review, Grok /review

v3_1_2_codex_round.change: first-principles/DDD/high-cohesion/low-coupling promoted to capability summary + first Use-when branch; added low-coupling keyword and non-review design docs guard
v3_1_2_codex_round.verification: targeted re-eval, 3 queries, 1 run/query, claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json Skill tool_use check, runtime copy synced via skills:install:local first
v3_1_2_codex_round.caveat: remaining 17 queries not re-run (keywords preserved superset of v3.1.1); measurement pitfall recorded: claude -p reads .agents/skills runtime copy, always sync before measuring

v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.method: pnpm skills:install:local first; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json Skill/Read tool_use contains agentic-review-handoff; props only under /tmp

queries.query: Please review the uncommitted cart-handler changes in my git repo at ~/coding/payment-svc — second pair of eyes, find real bugs, prefer auto loop with headless codex.
Team pasted review feedback claiming auth.ts returns 500 on empty token. Validate each claim as a defect report before any fix; use classic feedback validation packet if needed.
Add a React LoginForm with Zod email/password validation under apps/web and commit it. No review packet.

v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.note: description retuned to promote feedback validation in Use-when (first directed run undertriggered it)
v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.method_note: SUPERSEDED for metric comparison: used Skill/Read. See v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.

v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.method: pnpm skills:install:local first; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json; hit = Skill tool_use input contains agentic-review-handoff (NOT Read); props only under /tmp; re-measured 2026-07-22 to match original --max-turns 2 window (Codex R2 finding)
v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.metric_alignment: matches root metric: Skill tool only

queries.query: Please review the uncommitted cart-handler changes in my git repo at ~/coding/payment-svc — second pair of eyes, find real bugs, prefer auto loop with headless codex.
Team pasted review feedback claiming auth.ts returns 500 on empty token. Validate each claim as a defect report before any fix; use classic feedback validation packet if needed.

v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.change: feedback validation promoted to first Use-when clause of description (version 3.2.3); mirrors synced via pnpm skills:install:local + rsync to ~/.agents/skills (global install target)

v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.remeasure_detail: claude -p returns is_error=true api_error_status=429: "You've hit your session limit · resets 7:30pm (Asia/Singapore)". All Skill-tool invocations currently return without tools; headline 1/3 is NOT valid evidence. Do not treat this as a description regression until a post-quota remeasure runs.

prior_valid_skill_only_evidence.note: When Claude CLI was healthy, Grok recorded Skill-only 3/3 with max-turns 5; Codex later required max-turns 2 alignment — remeasure deferred until quota resets.
